message:
test(proptest): add 15 property tests for replay_mcp coverage gaps

MC-16 through MC-30: error_with_hint serde and predicates, validate_optional_str
present/missing/whitespace, validate_optional_u64 with present value,
validate_required_str whitespace/trimming/non-string rejection, schema_for
unknown names, arbitrary ReplayToolSchema serde, descriptions non-empty,
tool names count/uniqueness, error hint=None preservation, non-integer u64 default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
